reasoning: The control 8.2.6 focuses on examining user accounts and last logon information to verify inactive accounts are addressed. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that RBAC configurations are regularly reviewed to identify and clean up inactive users or service accounts. Additionally, audit logging can be configured to track user activities, which helps in identifying inactive accounts based on lack of activity.
